name: Media tile

variants.name: filled
variants.description: Contains an image thumbnail. Default state.

variants.name: empty_dropzone
variants.description: Accepts file uploads via drag-and-drop. Has dashed border.

variants.name: placeholder
variants.description: No image available. Shows an icon instead.

variants.name: error
variants.description: Error state. Red border, status tag with error tooltip.

variants.name: skeleton
variants.description: Loading state. Large box skeleton for image, pill skeletons for text.

tag.note: Image type tag, shown on top of image

actions.note: More than one action reveals option list

prominent_action.note: For Quality info of DI scans only

error_message.note: Shown in tooltip on error status tag

image.note: Thumbnail is always square. Cropped from center horizontally or vertically depending on orientation.

usage_rules.detail: Use media tiles only for listing graphical objects such as patient images. Do not use for listing actions or non-visual content.

usage_rules.rule: Consistent detail display within a gallery
usage_rules.detail: All media tiles in a gallery must either all show details (sublabel, actions) or all hide them. Do not mix.
When more than one action is provided, the action button reveals an option list. Do not render multiple visible action buttons.
The image thumbnail is always square. The original image is cropped from center.
In error state, the status tag must display a tooltip with the error message.

accessibility.selectable_note: When selectable, checkbox must have an accessible label describing the item

confidence_blockers: If ticket mixes tiles with and without details in the same gallery, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket requests media tile for non-image content (e.g. action list), flag and suggest List or Option list instead.

embedding_text: Media tile component. Lists graphical objects patient images. Variants: filled with image, empty dropzone upload, placeholder icon, error red border, skeleton loading. Always square cropped thumbnail. Multiple actions reveal option list. Consistent detail display across gallery. Not for non-visual content.
